title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEM OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN, REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECT FOR THE PROVINCE OF MASBATE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5178 / 53 OG No. 17, 5576 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1803, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEM OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN, REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECT FOR THE PROVINCE OF MASBATE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled;

SECTION 1. Item sixty-four of paragraph ac. page four hundred ninety-eight of Republic Act Numbered One thousand four hundred eleven, is amended read as follows:

"64. Malibas Barrio School Building, Palanas Construction of one-room

building ....................................................................................... P 4,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
